message: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants
You are looking for a particular hotel. Its name is called ashley hotel
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 6 people and 2 nights starting from friday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should be in the centre and should be in the cheap price range
The restaurant should serve chinese food
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for the same group of people at 15:45 on the same day
Make sure you get the reference number
